scripts.text:
-- Pull EST identifiers from config
SELECT DISTINCT Identifier AS EST_Identifier, Division
INTO #T_EST_CONFIG
FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
WHERE Identifier LIKE '%_EST';


-- ============================================================
-- Build combined forecast (actuals + future) for all EST divisions
-- ============================================================

SELECT M1.*
INTO #T_FORECAST
FROM (
    SELECT 
        A.DIVISION, A.Identifier, A.APPOINTMENT_DATE,
        A.PROJ_DEMO, A.PROJ_NET_ISSUED, A.PROJ_SOLD, A.PROJ_BTD, A.PROJ_CANCEL,
        A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, A.PROJ_NET_SALES, A.PROJ_DEMO_PCT, A.PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,
        A.BTD_PCT, A.BTD_AMT_PCT, A.CANCEL_PCT, A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
        A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT, A.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, A.PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        A.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT, A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, A.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,A.PROJ_SET_COUNT
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW] A
    JOIN #T_EST_CONFIG EC
        ON A.Division = EC.Division
        AND A.Identifier = EC.EST_Identifier

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        A.DIVISION, A.Identifier, A.APPOINTMENT_DATE,
        A.PROJ_DEMO, A.PROJ_NET_ISSUED, A.PROJ_SOLD, A.PROJ_BTD, A.PROJ_CANCEL,
        A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, A.PROJ_NET_SALES, A.PROJ_DEMO_PCT, A.PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,
        A.BTD_PCT, A.BTD_AMT_PCT, A.CANCEL_PCT, A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
        A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT, A.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, A.PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        A.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT, A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, A.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,A.PROJ_SET_COUNT
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW] A
    JOIN #T_EST_CONFIG EC
        ON A.Division = EC.Division
        AND A.Identifier = EC.EST_Identifier
    WHERE A.APPOINTMENT_DATE > (
        SELECT MAX(B.APPOINTMENT_DATE)
        FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW] B
        JOIN #T_EST_CONFIG EC2
            ON B.Division = EC2.Division
            AND B.Identifier = EC2.EST_Identifier
        WHERE B.Division = A.Division
          AND B.Identifier = A.Identifier
    )
) M1;


-- ============================================================
-- Compute monthly ratios (shared CTE logic)
-- ============================================================

;WITH MX AS 
(
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_BTD_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS BTD_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_CANCEL_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        DIVISION,
        Identifier,
        APPOINTMENT_DATE
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT)  OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_BTD_AMT)          OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_BTD_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT)       OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_CAL,
            *
        FROM #T_FORECAST
    ) M1
)

-- Update FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW
UPDATE A
SET 
    A.BTD_AMT_PCT          = MX.BTD_AMT_PCT_CAL,
    A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT    = MX.CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
    A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT = MX.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL
FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW] A
JOIN MX
    ON  A.Identifier      = MX.Identifier
    AND A.APPOINTMENT_DATE = MX.APPOINTMENT_DATE
    AND A.Division         = MX.Division;


-- ============================================================
-- Same update for FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW
-- ============================================================

;WITH MX AS 
(
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_BTD_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS BTD_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_CANCEL_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL, 0) = 0 THEN 0.00
             ELSE (PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_CAL * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL * 1.000)
        END AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
        DIVISION,
        Identifier,
        APPOINTMENT_DATE
    FROM (
        SELECT
            SUM(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT)  OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_BTD_AMT)          OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_BTD_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT)       OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT_CAL,
            SUM(PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Identifier, EOMONTH(APPOINTMENT_DATE)) AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_CAL,
            *
        FROM #T_FORECAST
    ) M1
)

UPDATE A
SET 
    A.BTD_AMT_PCT          = MX.BTD_AMT_PCT_CAL,
    A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT    = MX.CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL,
    A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT = MX.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT_CAL
FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW] A
JOIN MX
    ON  A.Identifier      = MX.Identifier
    AND A.APPOINTMENT_DATE = MX.APPOINTMENT_DATE
    AND A.Division         = MX.Division;

--************************************************
-- GROSS SALES AVERAGE
--************************************************


WITH  GS AS 
(
	SELECT 
		Division,
		CalendarDate,
		CASE WHEN SOLD_28DAYS=0 THEN 0 ELSE (GROSS_SALES_28DAYS / SOLD_28DAYS) END AS AVG_GROSS_SALES
		FROM 
			(
				SELECT 
				Division,
				CalendarDate,
				GROSS_SALES,
				SUM(GROSS_SALES) OVER (PARTITION BY Division 	ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS BETWEEN 31 PRECEDING AND 4 PRECEDING) AS GROSS_SALES_28DAYS,
				SUM(SOLD) OVER (PARTITION BY Division 			ORDER BY CalendarDate ROWS BETWEEN 31 PRECEDING AND 4 PRECEDING) AS SOLD_28DAYS
				FROM 
						(SELECT 
							Division,
							CalendarDate,
							SUM(GROSS_SALES) AS GROSS_SALES,
							SUM(SOLD)	AS SOLD
							FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
							GROUP BY 
							Division,
							CalendarDate
						) A
				
				) M1
		WHERE CalendarDate >='2019-01-01'

	)


SELECT 
A.Division,
A.CalendarDate,
CASE WHEN A.CalendarDate >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN B.AVG_GROSS_SALES ELSE A.AVG_GROSS_SALES END AS AVG_GROSS_SALES
INTO #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG
FROM GS A
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM GS WHERE CalendarDate = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) B
ON  A.Division     = B.Division;




--*********************************************
--*********************************************



SELECT 
DIVISION,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
DAY,
CALENDARDATE,
SUM(AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ       ) AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
SUM(AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ ) AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
SUM(AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ       ) AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ,
SUM(AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ	) AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ

INTO #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED
FROM 
(
		--Division
		
		SELECT 
		A.DIVISION
		,'BY_DIVISION' AS Identifier
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,A.DAY
		,A.CALENDARDATE							
		,(A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)				AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)		AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)				AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED] A
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		--Market
		SELECT 
		A.DIVISION
		,'BY_MARKET' AS Identifier
		,A.BranchID AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,A.DAY
		,A.CALENDARDATE							
		,(A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)	AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED] A
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		--Product
		SELECT 
		A.DIVISION
		,'BY_PRODUCT' AS Identifier
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID
		,A.ProductID AS ProductID
		,A.DAY
		,A.CALENDARDATE							
		,(A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)	AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)		AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED] A
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		--Market Config
		SELECT 
		A.DIVISION
		,B.Identifier
		,B.BranchID
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,A.DAY
		,A.CALENDARDATE							
		,(A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)	AS AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)			AS AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		,(A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ)		AS AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED] A
		JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) B
		ON A.BranchID = B.FilterBranch
		

	) M1
	
GROUP BY 
DIVISION,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
DAY,
CALENDARDATE;




--************* EXTRAPOLATE VALUES *****************


-- *********   #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED    **********

WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, C.CalendarDate) AS DAY
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
			
			) D
	WHERE EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(GETDATE())
	AND C.CalendarDate>=GETDATE() + 6
	
	),
	
M_CTE AS 
(
SELECT * FROM #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED  
WHERE CALENDARDATE>=GETDATE() -1
AND CALENDARDATE <=GETDATE() + 6
)


INSERT INTO #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED  


SELECT 
A.DIVISION
,B.Identifier
,B.BranchID
,B.ProductID
,A.DAY
,A.CalendarDate
,B.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
,B.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
,B.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ
,B.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ


FROM CAL A
JOIN M_CTE B
ON A.DAY = B.Day
AND A.Division=B.DIvision;




-- *********   #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW    **********



SELECT * INTO #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW FROM  [EDW_FCST].[FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW];



WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, C.CalendarDate) AS DAY
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]	
			) D
	WHERE EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(GETDATE())
	AND C.CalendarDate > (SELECT MAX(CalendarDate) FROM #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW )
	
	),
	
M_CTE AS 
(
SELECT * FROM #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW  
WHERE CALENDARDATE = (SELECT MAX(CalendarDate) FROM #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW )
)


INSERT INTO #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW  


SELECT 
A.Division          ,
B.Identifier        ,
A.CalendarDate      ,
B.BranchID          ,
B.ProductID         ,
B.BTD_PCT           ,
B.BTD_AMT_PCT       ,
B.CANCEL_PCT        ,
B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT ,
B.LastUpdatedTS

FROM CAL A
LEFT JOIN M_CTE B
 ON A.Division=B.DIvision;




-- *********   #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG    **********


WITH CAL AS 

(
	SELECT 
		C.CalendarDate,
		D.Division,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, C.CalendarDate) AS DAY
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
			
			) D
	WHERE EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) = EOMONTH(GETDATE())
	AND C.CalendarDate > (SELECT MAX(CalendarDate) FROM #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG  )
	
	),
	
M_CTE AS 
(
SELECT *, DATENAME(WEEKDAY,CalendarDate) AS DAY FROM #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG  
WHERE CALENDARDATE>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
)


INSERT INTO #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG  


SELECT 
A.Division          ,
A.CalendarDate      ,
B.AVG_GROSS_SALES

FROM CAL A
JOIN M_CTE B
ON A.DAY = B.DAY
AND A.Division=B.DIvision;




--**************** HOLIDAY ADJUSTMENT *******************



UPDATE A
SET 
A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ			= (AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ * COALESCE(B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_DEMO,0.00))				,
A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ	= (AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ * COALESCE(B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_NET_ISSUED,0.00) )	,
A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ			= (AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ * COALESCE(B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SOLD,0.00) )				,
A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ	= (AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ * COALESCE(B.HOLIDAY_ADJ_SET_COUNT,0.00) )

FROM #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED A 
JOIN [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_ADJUSTMENT] B
ON A.Division = B.Division
AND A.Identifier = B.Identifier
AND A.BranchID = B.BranchID
AND A.ProductID = B.ProductID
AND A.CalendarDate = B.CalendarDate
WHERE A.CalendarDATE > (SELECT MAX(CalendarDate) FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED] );






--**************************************
-- FINAL QUERY
--**************************************



SELECT 
DIVISION,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
DAY,
APPOINTMENT_DATE,
PROJ_DEMO		,
PROJ_NET_ISSUED	,
PROJ_SOLD		,
PROJ_BTD		,
PROJ_CANCEL		,

(COALESCE(PROJ_BTD,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL,0.00))				AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
(COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD,0.00) - (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL,0.00)) ) AS PROJ_NET_SALES	,

CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_NET_ISSUED,0)=0 THEN 0.000 ELSE (COALESCE(PROJ_DEMO,0.00) * 1.000/COALESCE(PROJ_NET_ISSUED,0.00) * 1.000	) END AS PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_DEMO,0) =0 		THEN 0.000 ELSE (COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD,0.00) * 1.000/COALESCE(PROJ_DEMO,0.00) * 1.000		) END AS PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

BTD_PCT,
BTD_AMT_PCT,
CANCEL_PCT,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,

(COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.00) + COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.00)) AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,

PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_BTD_AMT			,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT			,
(COALESCE(PROJ_BTD_AMT,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,0.00) )								AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
(COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,0.00) - (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD_AMT,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,0.00) ) )		AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,

CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_NET_ISSUED,0) = 0 THEN 0.000 ELSE ( ( COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,0.00) - (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD_AMT,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,0.00) ) ) * 1.000 / PROJ_NET_ISSUED * 1.000 ) END AS NSLI_AMT,

CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_NET_ISSUED,0) = 0 THEN 0.000 ELSE ( ( (COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD,0.00) - (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL,0.00)) ) ) * 1.000 / PROJ_NET_ISSUED * 1.000 ) END AS NCP_PCT,

PROJ_SET_COUNT

INTO #T_FINAL_V1

FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,Identifier
		,BranchID
		,ProductID
		,DAY
	    ,APPOINTMENT_DATE
		
		,SUM(PROJ_DEMO			  	)   AS  PROJ_DEMO			 
		,SUM(PROJ_NET_ISSUED	  	)   AS  PROJ_NET_ISSUED		 
		,SUM(PROJ_SOLD			  	)   AS  PROJ_SOLD			 
		,SUM(PROJ_BTD			  	)   AS  PROJ_BTD			 
		,SUM(PROJ_CANCEL		  	)   AS  PROJ_CANCEL			 
		,SUM(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT  	)  	AS  PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT 
		
		,SUM(PROJ_BTD_AMT			) 	AS  PROJ_BTD_AMT
		,SUM(PROJ_CANCEL_AMT		)   AS  PROJ_CANCEL_AMT
		
		,AVG(BTD_PCT			 	) AS BTD_PCT
		,AVG(BTD_AMT_PCT		 	) AS BTD_AMT_PCT
		,AVG(CANCEL_PCT		 		) AS CANCEL_PCT
		,AVG(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT		) AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	
		
		,SUM(PROJ_SET_COUNT			) AS PROJ_SET_COUNT
		
		FROM 
		(		
				SELECT 
				A.DIVISION,
				A.Identifier,
				A.BranchID,
				A.ProductID,
				A.DAY,
				A.CALENDARDATE													AS APPOINTMENT_DATE		,
				A.AVG_DEMO_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ									AS PROJ_DEMO			,
				A.AVG_NET_ISSUED_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ							AS PROJ_NET_ISSUED		,
				A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ									AS PROJ_SOLD			,
				B.BTD_PCT		* A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ 				AS PROJ_BTD				,
				B.CANCEL_PCT 	* A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ				AS PROJ_CANCEL			,
				GS.AVG_GROSS_SALES 		* A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ		AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
				
				B.BTD_AMT_PCT			* (GS.AVG_GROSS_SALES * A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ) 	AS PROJ_BTD_AMT			,
				B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT  	* (GS.AVG_GROSS_SALES * A.AVG_SOLD_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ) 	AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT		,
				
				B.BTD_PCT				,
				B.BTD_AMT_PCT			,
				B.CANCEL_PCT			,
				B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT		,
				A.AVG_SET_COUNT_LAST_4WEEKS_SEAS_ADJ							AS PROJ_SET_COUNT
				
				FROM #T_FACT_SALES_SEAS_HOL_ADJUSTED A 
				LEFT JOIN #T_FACT_BTD_CANCEL_NEW B
				ON  A.CalendarDate 	= B.CalendarDate
				AND A.Division	 	= B.Division
				AND A.BranchID		= B.BranchID
				AND A.ProductID		= B.ProductID
				AND A.Identifier	= B.Identifier
				
				LEFT JOIN #T_GROSS_SALES_AVG GS 
				ON  A.CalendarDate 	= GS.CalendarDate 
				AND A.Division 		= GS.Division
				
				) MX
				
		GROUP BY 
		DIVISION
		,Identifier
		,BranchID
		,ProductID
		,DAY
		,APPOINTMENT_DATE
		
		) M1;
		
		
		


--************* FINAL LOAD ******************





TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW];



INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW]
(
DIVISION	,
Identifier,
BranchID	,
ProductID	,
DAY	,
APPOINTMENT_DATE	,
PROJ_DEMO	,
PROJ_NET_ISSUED	,
PROJ_SOLD	,
PROJ_BTD	,
PROJ_CANCEL	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL	,
PROJ_NET_SALES	,
PROJ_DEMO_PCT	,
PROJ_CLOSE_PCT	,
BTD_PCT	,
BTD_AMT_PCT	,
CANCEL_PCT	,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT	,
PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_BTD_AMT	,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_SET_COUNT,
LastUpdatedTS	

)


SELECT 
DIVISION				,
Identifier				,
BranchID				,
ProductID				,
DAY						,
APPOINTMENT_DATE		,
PROJ_DEMO				,
PROJ_NET_ISSUED			,
PROJ_SOLD				,
PROJ_BTD				,
PROJ_CANCEL				,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL		,
PROJ_NET_SALES			,
--CAST(PROJ_DEMO_PCT 		AS DECIMAL(16,5))		 		AS PROJ_DEMO_PCT			,
--CAST(PROJ_CLOSE_PCT 	    AS DECIMAL(16,5))		 		AS PROJ_CLOSE_PCT			,
NULL AS PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
NULL AS PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

CAST(BTD_PCT 			AS DECIMAL(16,5))				AS BTD_PCT					,
CAST(BTD_AMT_PCT 		AS DECIMAL(16,5))			 	AS BTD_AMT_PCT				,
CAST(CANCEL_PCT 		AS DECIMAL(16,5))			 	AS CANCEL_PCT				,
CAST(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT 	AS DECIMAL(16,5))	 			AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT		,
CAST(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT 	AS DECIMAL(16,5)) 			AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT	,
PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_BTD_AMT			,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT			,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT		,
PROJ_SET_COUNT,
GETDATE()			

FROM  #T_FINAL_V1 
WHERE APPOINTMENT_DATE>='2023-01-01';



DELETE FROM  [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] WHERE CALENDARDATE > GETDATE();

SELECT 
A.CalendarDate,
B.Division,
B.BranchID,
B.ProductID
INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_1
FROM
	(SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate  FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] ) A
	JOIN 
	(SELECT DISTINCT DIVISION,BranchID,ProductID FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
	WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL) B
	ON 1=1;

	


SELECT * INTO #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH
FROM 
(	

	SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate,'BY_DIVISION' AS Identifier,Division,	CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS 	ProductID FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_1 

	UNION ALL 

	SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate,'BY_MARKET' 	AS Identifier,Division,			BranchID,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS 	ProductID FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_1 

	UNION ALL 

	SELECT DISTINCT CalendarDate,'BY_PRODUCT' AS Identifier,Division,	CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID,			ProductID FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_1  

	UNION ALL 

	-- Market Configuration
	SELECT DISTINCT A.CalendarDate,	B.Identifier,	B.Division,		B.BranchID,	CONCAT(B.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID 	
	FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH_1 A
	JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT Division,Identifier,BranchID FROM  [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) B
	ON A.BranchID = B.BranchID
	
	) M1;



SELECT * INTO #T_FACT_SALES_ACTUAL
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'BY_DIVISION' AS Identifier
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'BY_MARKET' AS Identifier
		,BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
		WHERE BranchID IS NOT NULL
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate,BranchID
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'BY_PRODUCT' AS Identifier
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS BranchID
		,ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL]
		WHERE ProductID IS NOT NULL
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate,ProductID
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		A.DIVISION
		,B.Identifier
		,B.BranchID
		,CONCAT(A.DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,A.CalendarDate
		,SUM(A.DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(A.NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(A.SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(A.GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] A 
		JOIN ( SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION] WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST' ) B 
		ON A.BranchID = B.FilterBranch
		GROUP BY A.DIVISION,A.CalendarDate,B.Identifier
		,B.BranchID
		
		/*
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'MAC_2023_GF' AS Identifier
		,'MAC-KC' AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
		WHERE DIVISION='MAC'
		AND BranchID IN ('MAC-KC', 'MAC-STL', 'MAC-OMLIN', 'MAC-CINDY', 'MAC-COL', 'MAC-LOU', 'MAC-CLT', 'MAC-RAL')
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'MAC_2024_GF' AS Identifier
		,'MAC-IND' AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
		WHERE DIVISION='MAC'
		AND BranchID IN ('MAC-IND','MAC-PITT','MAC-ALB' ,'MAC-ROCH','MAC-FG'  ,'MAC-SF')
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'MAC_2025_GF' AS Identifier
		,'MAC-DL' AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
		WHERE DIVISION='MAC'
		AND BranchID IN ('MAC-DL','MAC-SCRN','MAC-FW','MAC-SPF')
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		SELECT 
		DIVISION
		,'MAC_2026_GF' AS Identifier
		,'MAC-GR' AS BranchID
		,CONCAT(DIVISION,'-') AS ProductID
		,CalendarDate
		,SUM(DEMO)			AS DEMO
		,SUM(NET_ISSUED)	AS NET_ISSUED
		,SUM(SOLD)			AS SOLD
		,SUM(GROSS_SALES)	AS GROSS_SALES
		FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL] 
		WHERE DIVISION='MAC'
		AND BranchID IN ('MAC-GR')
		GROUP BY DIVISION,CalendarDate
		
		*/
		
		
		
	) M_A;





TRUNCATE TABLE  [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW];


INSERT INTO  [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW]
(
DIVISION	,
Identifier  ,
BranchID	,
ProductID	,
DAY	,
APPOINTMENT_DATE	,
PROJ_DEMO	,
PROJ_NET_ISSUED	,
PROJ_SOLD	,
PROJ_BTD	,
PROJ_CANCEL	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL	,
PROJ_NET_SALES	,
PROJ_DEMO_PCT	,
PROJ_CLOSE_PCT	,
BTD_PCT	,
BTD_AMT_PCT	,
CANCEL_PCT	,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT	,
PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_BTD_AMT	,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_SET_COUNT,
LastUpdatedTS	

)


SELECT 
DIVISION,
Identifier,
BranchID,
ProductID,
DAY,
APPTDATE,
DEMO,
NET_ISSUED,
SOLD,
PROJ_BTD AS PROJ_BTD,
PROJ_CANCEL AS PROJ_CANCEL,
(COALESCE(PROJ_BTD,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL,0.00) ) AS TOTAL_CANCEL,
COALESCE(SOLD,0.00) - ( COALESCE(PROJ_BTD,0.00) + COALESCE(PROJ_CANCEL,0.00) ) AS NETSALES, 

NULL AS DEMO_PCT,
NULL AS CLOSE_PCT,

BTD_PCT,
BTD_AMT_PCT,
CANCEL_PCT,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
(COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.0000) + COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) ) AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,
GROSS_SALES,
PROJ_BTD_AMT,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,

(COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.0000) + COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) ) * COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00) AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00) - ( (COALESCE(BTD_AMT_PCT,0.0000) + COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) ) * COALESCE(GROSS_SALES,0.00) ) AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,

0.00 AS PROJ_SET_COUNT,
GETDATE()

FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
		M1.DIVISION,
		M1.Identifier,
		M1.BranchID,
		M1.ProductID,
		DATENAME(WEEKDAY, M1.CalendarDate) AS DAY,
		M1.CalendarDate AS APPTDATE,
		A.DEMO,
		A.NET_ISSUED,
		A.SOLD,
		(COALESCE(B.BTD_PCT,0.0000) * COALESCE(A.SOLD,0.00) ) 				AS PROJ_BTD,
		(COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) * COALESCE(A.SOLD,0.00) ) 	AS PROJ_CANCEL,
		
		A.GROSS_SALES,
		B.BTD_PCT,
		B.BTD_AMT_PCT,
		B.CANCEL_PCT,
		B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
		B.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,
		
		
		(COALESCE(B.BTD_AMT_PCT,0.0000) * COALESCE(A.GROSS_SALES,0.00) ) 	AS PROJ_BTD_AMT,
		
		
		(COALESCE(B.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,0.0000) * COALESCE(A.GROSS_SALES,0.00) ) 	AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT
		
		FROM #T_DIV_PROD_BRANCH M1 
		LEFT JOIN #T_FACT_SALES_ACTUAL A 
		ON 
		M1.DIVISION      	 = A.DIVISION
		AND M1.BranchID      = A.BranchID
		AND M1.ProductID     = A.ProductID
		AND M1.CalendarDate  = A.CalendarDate
		AND M1.Identifier	 = A.Identifier
		
		LEFT JOIN [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW] B
		ON  M1.CALENDARDATE = B.APPOINTMENT_DATE
		AND M1.Division 	= B.Division
		AND M1.BranchID 	= B.BranchID
		AND M1.ProductID 	= B.ProductID
		AND M1.Identifier   = B.Identifier
		
		WHERE  M1.CalendarDATE < GETDATE()
		
			) M1
	
	WHERE APPTDATE>='2023-01-01';

;WITH M1 AS 
(  
SELECT
DIVISION	,
Identifier	,
BranchID	,
ProductID	,
DAY	,
APPOINTMENT_DATE	,
PROJ_DEMO	,
PROJ_NET_ISSUED	,
PROJ_SOLD	,
PROJ_BTD	,
PROJ_CANCEL	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL	,
PROJ_NET_SALES	,
PROJ_DEMO_PCT	,
PROJ_CLOSE_PCT	,
BTD_PCT	,
BTD_AMT_PCT	,
CANCEL_PCT	,
CANCELLED_AMT_PCT	,
TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT	,
PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_BTD_AMT	,
PROJ_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT	,
PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT	,
PROJ_SET_COUNT
FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW] 
WHERE APPOINTMENT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
),

-- EST config per division (Identifier like MAC_EST, BranchID like MAC-PER)
EST_CONFIG AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT Identifier AS EST_Identifier, 
	BranchID AS EST_BranchID, 
	Division
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
    WHERE Identifier LIKE '%_EST'
),

-- GF identifiers per division (everything that's NOT _EST)
GF_IDENTIFIERS AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT Identifier, Division
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
    WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST'
),

-- Sum all GF identifiers per division
GF_TOTALS AS
(
    SELECT 
        M.DIVISION,
        M.APPOINTMENT_DATE,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_DEMO, 0))               AS PROJ_DEMO,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_ISSUED, 0))          AS PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_SOLD, 0))                AS PROJ_SOLD,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_BTD, 0))                 AS PROJ_BTD,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_CANCEL, 0))              AS PROJ_CANCEL,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, 0))        AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_SALES, 0))           AS PROJ_NET_SALES,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0.00))  AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_BTD_AMT, 0.00))          AS PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT, 0.00))       AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, 0.00)) AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT, 0.00))    AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_SET_COUNT,0))            AS PROJ_SET_COUNT
    FROM M1 M
    JOIN GF_IDENTIFIERS CNF
        ON  M.Identifier = CNF.Identifier
        AND M.DIVISION   = CNF.Division
    GROUP BY M.DIVISION, M.APPOINTMENT_DATE
),

M2 AS 
(
    SELECT 
        A.DIVISION,
        EC.EST_Identifier   AS Identifier,
        EC.EST_BranchID     AS BranchID,
        A.ProductID,
        A.DAY,
        A.APPOINTMENT_DATE,

        (A.PROJ_DEMO             - G.PROJ_DEMO)              AS PROJ_DEMO,
        (A.PROJ_NET_ISSUED       - G.PROJ_NET_ISSUED)        AS PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
        (A.PROJ_SOLD             - G.PROJ_SOLD)              AS PROJ_SOLD,
        (A.PROJ_BTD              - G.PROJ_BTD)               AS PROJ_BTD,
        (A.PROJ_CANCEL           - G.PROJ_CANCEL)            AS PROJ_CANCEL,
        (A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL     - G.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL)      AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
        (A.PROJ_NET_SALES        - G.PROJ_NET_SALES)         AS PROJ_NET_SALES,
        (A.PROJ_SET_COUNT        - G.PROJ_SET_COUNT)         AS PROJ_SET_COUNT,

        NULL AS PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
        NULL AS PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

        A.BTD_PCT,
        A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
        A.CANCEL_PCT,
        A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
        A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,

        (A.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT  - G.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT)  AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_BTD_AMT          - G.PROJ_BTD_AMT)           AS PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT       - G.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT)        AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT - G.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT)  AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT    - G.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT)     AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT

    FROM M1 A
    JOIN EST_CONFIG EC
        ON A.DIVISION = EC.Division
    JOIN GF_TOTALS G
        ON  A.DIVISION         = G.DIVISION
        AND A.APPOINTMENT_DATE = G.APPOINTMENT_DATE
    WHERE A.Identifier = 'BY_DIVISION'
)

INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_NEW]
(
    DIVISION, Identifier, BranchID, ProductID, DAY, APPOINTMENT_DATE,
    PROJ_DEMO, PROJ_NET_ISSUED, PROJ_SOLD, PROJ_BTD, PROJ_CANCEL,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, PROJ_NET_SALES, PROJ_DEMO_PCT, PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,
    BTD_PCT, BTD_AMT_PCT, CANCEL_PCT, CANCELLED_AMT_PCT, TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,
    PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, PROJ_BTD_AMT, PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,PROJ_SET_COUNT, LastUpdatedTS
)
SELECT 
    DIVISION,
    Identifier,
    BranchID,
    ProductID,
    DAY,
    APPOINTMENT_DATE,
    PROJ_DEMO,
    PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
    PROJ_SOLD,
    PROJ_BTD,
    PROJ_CANCEL,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
    PROJ_NET_SALES,
    PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
    PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD, 0) = 0             THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(BTD_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_SOLD * 1.000)                         END AS BTD_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD_AMT, 0.00) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)           END AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD, 0) = 0             THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_SOLD * 1.000)                       END AS CANCEL_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)     END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)  END AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,

    PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
    PROJ_BTD_AMT,
    PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,
    PROJ_SET_COUNT,
    CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
FROM M2;

;WITH M1 AS 
(
    SELECT
        DIVISION, Identifier, BranchID, ProductID, DAY, APPOINTMENT_DATE,
        PROJ_DEMO, PROJ_NET_ISSUED, PROJ_SOLD, PROJ_BTD, PROJ_CANCEL,
        PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, PROJ_NET_SALES, PROJ_DEMO_PCT, PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,
        BTD_PCT, BTD_AMT_PCT, CANCEL_PCT, CANCELLED_AMT_PCT, TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,
        PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, PROJ_BTD_AMT, PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
        PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,PROJ_SET_COUNT
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW] 
    WHERE APPOINTMENT_DATE >= '2024-01-01'
),

EST_CONFIG AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT Identifier AS EST_Identifier, BranchID AS EST_BranchID, Division
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
    WHERE Identifier LIKE '%_EST'
),

GF_IDENTIFIERS AS
(
    SELECT DISTINCT Identifier, Division
    FROM [EDW_FCST].[DIM_MARKET_CONFIGURATION]
    WHERE Identifier NOT LIKE '%_EST'
),

GF_TOTALS AS
(
    SELECT 
        M.DIVISION,
        M.APPOINTMENT_DATE,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_DEMO, 0))               AS PROJ_DEMO,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_ISSUED, 0))          AS PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_SOLD, 0))                AS PROJ_SOLD,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_BTD, 0))                 AS PROJ_BTD,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_CANCEL, 0))              AS PROJ_CANCEL,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, 0))        AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_SALES, 0))           AS PROJ_NET_SALES,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0.00))  AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_BTD_AMT, 0.00))          AS PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT, 0.00))       AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, 0.00)) AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT, 0.00))    AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,
        SUM(COALESCE(M.PROJ_SET_COUNT,0))            AS PROJ_SET_COUNT
    FROM M1 M
    JOIN GF_IDENTIFIERS CNF
        ON  M.Identifier = CNF.Identifier
        AND M.DIVISION   = CNF.Division
    GROUP BY M.DIVISION, M.APPOINTMENT_DATE
),

M2 AS 
(
    SELECT 
        A.DIVISION,
        EC.EST_Identifier   AS Identifier,
        EC.EST_BranchID     AS BranchID,
        A.ProductID,
        A.DAY,
        A.APPOINTMENT_DATE,

        (A.PROJ_DEMO             - G.PROJ_DEMO)              AS PROJ_DEMO,
        (A.PROJ_NET_ISSUED       - G.PROJ_NET_ISSUED)        AS PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
        (A.PROJ_SOLD             - G.PROJ_SOLD)              AS PROJ_SOLD,
        (A.PROJ_BTD              - G.PROJ_BTD)               AS PROJ_BTD,
        (A.PROJ_CANCEL           - G.PROJ_CANCEL)            AS PROJ_CANCEL,
        (A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL     - G.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL)      AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
        (A.PROJ_NET_SALES        - G.PROJ_NET_SALES)         AS PROJ_NET_SALES,
        (A.PROJ_SET_COUNT        - G.PROJ_SET_COUNT)         AS PROJ_SET_COUNT,

        NULL AS PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
        NULL AS PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

        A.BTD_PCT,
        A.BTD_AMT_PCT,
        A.CANCEL_PCT,
        A.CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
        A.TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,

        (A.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT  - G.PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT)  AS PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_BTD_AMT          - G.PROJ_BTD_AMT)           AS PROJ_BTD_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT       - G.PROJ_CANCEL_AMT)        AS PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT - G.PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT)  AS PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
        (A.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT    - G.PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT)     AS PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT

    FROM M1 A
    JOIN EST_CONFIG EC
        ON A.DIVISION = EC.Division
    JOIN GF_TOTALS G
        ON  A.DIVISION         = G.DIVISION
        AND A.APPOINTMENT_DATE = G.APPOINTMENT_DATE
    WHERE A.Identifier = 'BY_DIVISION'
)

INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_FORECAST_ACT_YSTDY_NEW]
(
    DIVISION, Identifier, BranchID, ProductID, DAY, APPOINTMENT_DATE,
    PROJ_DEMO, PROJ_NET_ISSUED, PROJ_SOLD, PROJ_BTD, PROJ_CANCEL,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL, PROJ_NET_SALES, PROJ_DEMO_PCT, PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,
    BTD_PCT, BTD_AMT_PCT, CANCEL_PCT, CANCELLED_AMT_PCT, TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,
    PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, PROJ_BTD_AMT, PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT, PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,PROJ_SET_COUNT, LastUpdatedTS
)
SELECT 
    DIVISION,
    Identifier,
    BranchID,
    ProductID,
    DAY,
    APPOINTMENT_DATE,
    PROJ_DEMO,
    PROJ_NET_ISSUED,
    PROJ_SOLD,
    PROJ_BTD,
    PROJ_CANCEL,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL,
    PROJ_NET_SALES,
    PROJ_DEMO_PCT,
    PROJ_CLOSE_PCT,

    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD, 0) = 0             THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(BTD_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_SOLD * 1.000)                         END AS BTD_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(PROJ_BTD_AMT, 0.00) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)           END AS BTD_AMT_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_SOLD, 0) = 0             THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(CANCEL_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_SOLD * 1.000)                       END AS CANCEL_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(CANCELLED_AMT_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)     END AS CANCELLED_AMT_PCT,
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT, 0) = 0  THEN 0 ELSE (COALESCE(TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT, 0.0000) * 1.000 / PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT * 1.000)  END AS TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT_PCT,

    PROJ_GROSS_SALES_AMT,
    PROJ_BTD_AMT,
    PROJ_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_TOTAL_CANCEL_AMT,
    PROJ_NET_SALES_AMT,
    PROJ_SET_COUNT,
    CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
FROM M2;
